answer.text: Only a portion of the total order quantity to be visible to the market at a time
The full order quantity to be hidden permanently
Orders to be placed without a price

explanation.text: **The Logic:** DQ orders show only a part of the total quantity. E.g., 1000 lots with DQ 200 shows only 200 at a time. After 200 is traded, the next 200 is automatically released. **The Trap:** The order is not fully hidden — portions are shown sequentially. The full quantity still gets executed. **Cross-Exam Context:** DQ is tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** DQ is used by large traders to avoid market impact — showing the full size might move the market against them.
